title: Piquant Croatian Pecorino Broth
description: A savory, fermented broth with a glassy jelly consistency, highlighted by sharp pecorino and aromatic herbs, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, saute until translucent.
Stir in julienned carrot and sliced celery, cooking for two minutes.
Pour in fermented vegetable broth and water, bringing to a gentle boil.
Add red pepper flakes, black pepper, and sea salt, then reduce heat and simmer for ten minutes.
Remove the pot from heat and let the broth cool to room temperature, allowing it to thicken into a glassy jelly.
Grate pecorino cheese over the cooled broth, stirring until it melts into the liquid.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves just before serving.
Serve hot or at room temperature, enjoying the fermented depth and pecorino sparkle.
